title: Player Action Tracker
description: Tracks certain action of the player and logs it
body: Player Action Tracker or PAT for short is meant to track actions of the player and logs it. I made it to be used to feed my AI program meant to roast your ass on what ever the hell you doing. Its funny. Currently I ahve two version 1.21.8 and 1.8.9 and might update it for new version and maybe the 1.8.9 as well in the future.
